name: llaminate
description: A simple but powerful library that abstracts LLM chat completions, providing chat history, tokens tracking and tools interfaces.

scripts.build: tsc && terser dist/llaminate.js -o dist/llaminate.min.js --source-map --comments 'some' && rm dist/llaminate.js dist/llaminate.js.map

author: Oliver Moran <oliver.moran@gmail.com>
